ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for (petitioner) Duane Fitzpatrick.

Ms. Stoneman apologized, stated that she received the examiner's notes and intended to reply, that they were then hit by lawsuits and are in no position to do distribution, that everyone has been notified, requested that the Petition for Final Distribution be taken off calendar and the Court granted the request.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-01-2016 Continued To Nov-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the trustee and his attorney to appear on November 29, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the response to examiner's notes has not been filed. The Court will consider suspension of the trustees powers at that hearing. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-04-2016 Continued To Nov-01-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Continued To Oct-04-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Continued To Jan-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Dec-23-2015 Continued To Jan-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Todd Christensen of Philips Bonding Company.

Mr. Christensen explained to the court that he has been in touch with Ms. Stoneman via text, that she is out today with a sick child, that she tried to reach the examiner, that the bond was issued on 12/2/15 but Mr. Fitzpatrick has been out of country and has not signed it yet. The Court stated that it was issued 21 days ago, that it could have been sent via DHL or Federal Express for signature, that the trust has been under Mr. Fitzpatrick's control for 3 months without adequate bond, that there is no excuse and asked when Mr. Fitzpatrick would be back. Mr. Christensen stated that the text indicates that the document is being overnighted to Ms. Stoneman and that she should have it today or tomorrow. The Court stated that this will be the last continuance and that if the bond is not on file the trustee will likely be suspended. The status on filing bond and the Order to Appear were continued to January 6, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Continued To Dec-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Continued To Dec-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Continued To Dec-16-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Continued To Dec-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Continued To Dec-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Continued To Dec-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for (trustee) Duane Fitzpatrick.

Ms. Stoneman reported that the vast majority of the trust is in two pieces of real property, that they will be on the market soon, that they are working with Philips Bonding Company regarding the 4.5 million dollar bond, that due to the holiday it will not be ready for filing until next week and requested a two week continuance to get the bond filed. The Court stated that it is considering suspending the trustee as he has been operating without a bond for a couple of months. Ms. Stoneman stated that this was her error, that she thought the bond only needed to be for the cash on hand, that due to the holiday they are unable to get the bond filed this week, that the trustee is actively in the process of construction and asked that they be given a short continuance to get the bond filed. The status on filing bond and the Order to Appear were continued to December 2, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Continued To Dec-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Continued To Nov-25-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that a bond has been filed but that Ms. Stoneman's declaration is needed to provide information regarding the propriety of the bond. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney Heather Stoneman to appear on November 25, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the declaration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Bond
Off Calendar Oct-14-2015 Continued To Oct-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for and with (petitioner) Duane Fitzpatrick.

The Court asked counsel if she had file stamped copies of the 3 requested documents. Ms. Stoneman reported that she has all of the documents and will e-file them today, that there is an issue regarding fees to the successor trustee, explained the 5% term in the trust, that the only person contesting this is the drafting attorney and that it is clearly the decedents wish to compensate the trustee. The petition for order appointing successor trustee will be taken under submission once the requested documents have been filed.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Continued To Sep-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
